expected_records.title: Find A Friend
expected_records.description: Search the Resort for a hidden Sebastian photo prop. Once located, snap a photo and then head to the Front Desk to receive a surprise!

expected_records.title: Poolside Activities
expected_records.description: Join us for family-friendly activities, both in and out of the pool. See a Recreation Cast Member for more information.

expected_records.title: Nature Walk
expected_records.description: Enjoy a self-led nature walk around Barefoot Bay. Pick up a Nature Guide at the front desk to get started.
